mapper.update:
update doctor
email = #{email},
specialty = #{specialty},
where doctor_no = #{doctorNo}
mapper.select: select wt.work_date,wt.work_time,d.doctor_no,dept.dept_name,wt.reserve_max,wt.reserved from work_table wt inner join doctor d on wt.doctor_no = d.doctor_no inner join dept on d.dept_id = dept.dept_id where d.doctor_no=#{doctorNo}

select mc.patient_name,mc.card_id from reservation r inner join medical_cards mc on r.card_id = mc.card_id inner join doctor d on r.doctor_name = d.doctor_name inner join work_table on d.doctor_no = work_table.doctor_no where work_date=#{workDate} and work_time=#{workTime} and d.doctor_no=#{doctorNo}
